23
24
25
26 Man Tax: Adam Rodriguez
"What wisdom can you find that is greater than kindness?" - Jean Jacques Rousseau So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. For the couple people that have said I'm "scamming" people, I only get SNAP, so this money goes to things like TP, shampoo, laundry detergent, etc.
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: Using religion as they always have to persecute their opponents
item.dc:creator: thebigbaka

item.title: FART FACTORY
item.description:
You scroll past these comics to escape stress, but on the other side, creators are drowning in it. Platforms profit from our work, but we see none of it. Patreon is the difference between creating out of love and creating out of desperation. If you've ever laughed, smiled, or felt less alone because of our comics, know this: Your support means the world to us. Thank you for being part of the story and helping us keep creating what we love. https://www.patreon.com/warandpeas
This lifesaving sturdy shopper bag is made from EarthAware certified 100% organic cotton. The cartoon is a handmade silkscreen print, produced locally: https://warandpeas.shop/collections/bags
This mouse has figured out the secret to happiness in the digital age: Direct delivery of things that actually make you laugh. No doomscrolling. No "suggested content" that's somehow both aggressive and depressing. Just comics – at least one new strip every week – arriving like a small, manageable gift you didn't have to hunt for between seventeen ads for things you mentioned once out loud near your phone. The mouse is living its best life. The mouse has transcended the algorithm. Be like the mouse and join the enlightened rodent club: https://warandpeas.com/subscribe/
item.dc:creator: Warandpeasofficial

item.title: I see said the blind man .....
item.description: Donald Trump’s cuts to Medicaid just didn’t strip over 1 million Americans of their healthcare. It also took access to healthcare away from millions more, especially those if live in rural communities. By the end of the year almost 500 healthcare facilities, including hospitals and urgent care centers, will have closed because of Donald Trump and the Republican Congress.
item.dc:creator: Xalten2

item.title: Leftover memes on a Sunday
item.description:
Welcome to this dump of random memes. Sometimes I make them themed, sometimes I don't. If you enjoy laughing without talking politics, getting away from the horrors of the world, or escaping reality, you’ll love following this page!
Kinda true
I thought I sounded decent but I’m no pop singer
Is your wife a sims character?
I did exactly this. Imaginary friends are overrated. I had siblings instead.
I say ‘morning’ because it isn’t good yet
Considering the current economy, $6 is cheaper than McDonald’s
Yet if you didn’t do it, it would never get done
Only if they’re dill
What’s with the dead eyes in kid’s school pictures?
A true villain
He’s gone for most of it, just having a glow up, and helps Frodo very little
He needed some encouragement
My kids do crap like this
Exercise is much easier when it’s fun
Sexy
Wow, that show was so good
I need to have this conversation with my kids and with myself
If I weren’t afraid of aquariums, I would love this
She’s a genius
I want to do this for my sister
I thought it was rats but I get ya
Amazing piece
Nothing catches light quite like real flower petals
This is real. It’s in a sketchbook for his grandchildren.
It is popular but you have to be okay with hanging out with the elderly
She is both 5 and 63
Oh, you have the confidence of Bobby
Such a beautiful translation
One of the best episodes
I think it might be, actually
It was only two episodes, I think
They probably have but it didn’t work
Funniest thing on the show
Hate grandpa so much but it did show me that there’s some baffling kinks out there
Teddy doesn’t seem like the cleanest guy anyway
Poor Rudy
I probably don’t even look that good
Never understood why they gave the kid who so obviously loved horses the quest horse ever
They just keep getting bigger and bigger too
Sadly, I’m going down the same mental health path as my mom but I do have much more resources than she did. She’s doing well now.
I mean, David proclaims that the Lord will strike down his enemies in psalms
It’s still super fun 15 years later
If only they would look at my playlists
All the other kids with the pumped up kicks vibes
Why yes, purchases do make me feel better
Sometimes it’s a fun quest
Happens a lot
Smart kid
Why yes, I am a weird girl into smut and butts
item.dc:creator: GigglySprinkleCupcake

item.title: Meanwhile in Albania
item.description: Thousands of people gathered in Tirana, Albania, to peacefully protest and make their voices heard. The demonstration focused on concerns about the future of Albania’s coastline, environmental protection, and public transparency. A powerful moment showing citizens coming together for a cause they believe in
item.dc:creator: DarthPutinKGB

Like what we do and how we do it? Leave a tip. Or don't. It's totally cool either way. Stay True & Stay Tuned - Meta Pathos
item.dc:creator: MetaPathos

item.title: GovBrief Today #514
item.description: While American forces stand in harm's way across the Gulf, Donald Trump spent his weekend choosing trees. Iran attacked Bahrain and Kuwait, two American allies, and threatened to walk away from peace talks. The U.S. struck back. Both sides say they want the ceasefire to hold even as they keep trading fire. And on Sunday, the president rode in a motorcade across Washington to tour the renovations he has been making to the capital. He announced that work to bulldoze a public golf course will begin September 1, defying a federal judge's warning not to touch it without permission, and that 47 maple trees will be planted at Lafayette Square outside the White House to honor his role as the 47th president. He posted a new rendering of his unbuilt ballroom and insisted the algae in the Reflecting Pool was criminally made. I've emailed 8,004 stories over 514 straight nights, free and without ads. The algorithm can't show them all to you. Add your email address at govbrief.today and I will. #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's free!): https://gbounacos.substack.com/ Today's full brief: https://go.govbrief.today/260626-full [1] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-june28 [2] https://go.govbrief.today/ice-critic-vacation [3] https://go.govbrief.today/aoc-tech [4] https://go.govbrief.today/dc-golf [5] https://go.govbrief.today/mullin-tps [6] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-jlg [7] https://go.govbrief.today/lafayette-sq Subscribe (It's free!): https://gbounacos.substack.com/
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos
